title: Cuneiform Tablet #0591: Old Assyrian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
